headline: Teardown in progress (epic #80). #50 DONE locally on claude/storybook-publishable-9tdovm (not pushed): cut the local-AI/agent bot layer — Modelfile, ask-hds.sh, llm-stream-bridge.mjs, hds-sync.js, codemods/, claude-config/, docs/ai/, AGENTS.md, LOCAL_AI_PROMPT.md, plus the dead scripts/loop/ orchestration-loop system (discovered live-dependent on the deleted docs/ai/orchestration.json via a vitest test — deleted along with its test since nothing gated needed it), all preserved on archive/local-ai. Retained per Adrian override: llms.txt generation (scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs, public/llms.txt, docs:llms/llms:generate) as core DS self-documentation. pipeline/ was NOT deleted — still live-wired into the gated `pretest` chain via scripts/test-figma-masters-snapshot.mjs → pipeline/figma-masters-batch.mjs; cutting it needs a follow-up to first un-gate or migrate that dependency. package.json unwired (figma:stream, codemod, loop:validate/next/status removed); CLAUDE.md leaned (dead asset-workflow bullets from #49); ADR-018 §3 amended; PR/issue templates + a stale doc-page-header.tsx comment patched off deleted paths. All 8 required gates green (typecheck, lint, build:lib, build-storybook, vitest 1059, smoke:consumer, verify-tokens+check-contrast, pretest). 4 dangling doc-refs remain in OPERATING_MAP.md/SYSTEMS_REGISTRY.md/AGENT_CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md for #53. Earlier: #51 DONE (legacy docs SPA stripped).
next: Remaining teardown cluster: #49 (delete portfolio assets/apps outright — note portfolio PAGES already removed with #51), #53 (consolidate ~27 md docs → ~5, and fix the doc-ref-integrity dangling refs #50 surfaced in OPERATING_MAP.md/SYSTEMS_REGISTRY.md/AGENT_CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md). Attended — lead reviews before merge.

Follow-up surfaced by #50: pipeline/ (figma-masters-batch.mjs, retry-loop.mjs, format-correction.mjs) is still gated via pretest → check:figma-snapshot and wired to ui:gen/ui:fix/ui:masters, which itself calls out to an LLM API — needs a scoped decision (migrate off pipeline/ pretest dependency, or fold pipeline/ into the ADR-018 §3 cut explicitly with a plan for the gate) before it can be removed.

Follow-up hygiene surfaced by #51 (non-blocking): reconcile the 13 pre-existing check-validator-wiring firingChannel/precommit-hash drifts; prune stale paths from knip.config.ts; decide check-reduced-motion Layer-2 semantics for a library (no App.tsx root).
Deferred post-freeze: #60 (cva rollout), #64 (Astro evaluation). Human-owned: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap.
